title: Nilpotent-by-Noetherian Factorized Groups
author_string: Amberg, Bernhard, Franciosi, Silvana, de Giovanni, Francesco
abstract: AbstractIt is shown that a soluble-by-finite product G = AB of a nilpotent-by-noetherian group A and a noetherian group B is nilpotentby- noetherian. Moreover, a bound for the torsion-free rank of the Fitting factor group of G is given, in terms of the torsion-free rank of the Fitting factor group of A and the torsion-free rank of B.
